# Supported Countries

Acme Shop ships to Canada, the United Kingdom, the European Union, Australia, and Japan. Shipping to other destinations is not yet available, though the list of supported countries expands periodically. Orders to supported countries display the landed cost, including duties, before checkout so there are no surprises at shipment.

[Source: international_shipping.md#supported-countries]
